name: codex-pet-director
description: Create official custom Codex desktop pets with a beginner-friendly director flow and /create-pet entrypoint.

interface.shortDescription: Create official custom Codex desktop pets.
interface.longDescription: A beginner-friendly director flow for creating official Codex desktop pets. It starts from /create-pet, checks the local pet environment, interviews the user in simple blocks, generates visual confirmations, records a pet brief, and hands final production to hatch-pet.
defaultPrompt: Help me create a custom Codex desktop pet.
我有一张参考图，帮我做成 Codex 官方桌面宠物。
